mapper.select: SELECT FROM cs_api_resource WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY service_name, controller_path, path, http_method
SELECT FROM cs_api_resource WHERE resource_code = #{resourceCode} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM cs_api_resource WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT DISTINCT ar.id,ar.resource_code,ar.service_name,ar.controller_path,ar.controller_name,ar.http_method,ar.path,ar.method_name,ar.description,ar.request_example,ar.response_example,ar.enabled,ar.created_at,ar.updated_at,ar.deleted FROM cs_api_resource ar JOIN cs_role_resource rr ON ar.id = rr.resource_id AND rr.deleted = FALSE JOIN cs_role r ON r.id = rr.role_id AND r.deleted = FALSE AND r.enabled = TRUE WHERE ar.deleted = FALSE AND ar.enabled = TRUE AND rr.role_id IN #{roleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE cs_api_resource SET service_name=#{serviceName},controller_path=#{controllerPath},controller_name=#{controllerName},http_method=#{httpMethod},path=#{path},method_name=#{methodName},description=#{description},request_example=#{requestExample},response_example=#{responseExample},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE resource_code=#{resourceCode} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE cs_api_resource SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE cs_role_resource SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT rr.resource_id FROM cs_role_resource rr JOIN cs_api_resource ar ON ar.id = rr.resource_id WHERE rr.role_id = #{roleId} AND rr.deleted = FALSE AND ar.deleted = FALSE AND ar.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY rr.resource_id
